metrics.sampling_method: Compare candidate replay results against baseline on local redacted tasks.
metrics.description: Primary skill-quality metric for measurable skill setpoints.

metrics.sampling_method: Count unsupported memory candidates or writes over checked memory artifacts.
Count public-memory risk or public-output safety incidents in local audit evidence.
Count provider timeout events over provider calls in redacted local failure evidence.
Count learning routes covered by current local fixtures and distilled events.
metrics.description: Dry-run health metric for route coverage.

metrics.sampling_method: Compare deterministic extractor output with hand-labeled fixture signals.
metrics.description: Recall of rule-based signal extraction against fixture truth.

metrics.sampling_method: Compare deterministic extractor output with hand-labeled fixture signals.
metrics.description: Precision of rule-based signal extraction against fixture truth.

metrics.sampling_method: Count true live-effect flags in dry-run and shadow reports.
Pure reducer: schema-valid session-distiller outputs divided by total checked outputs in the local health window.
metrics.sampling_window: current run or local health history window
metrics.description: Deterministic health metric for session-distiller schema validity.

metrics.sampling_method: Pure reducer: runtime next-step decisions that map to registered runtime actuators divided by total next-step decisions.
metrics.description: Deterministic health metric for runtime-thread next-step reducer registration.

metrics.sampling_method: Pure reducer: dead-letter inbox items divided by total inbox items in the human ACK window.
metrics.description: Deterministic health metric for work-order inbox dead letters.

metrics.sampling_method: Pure reducer: median latency between inbox creation and human ACK.
metrics.description: Diagnostic context metric for human ACK delay on work-order inbox items.

metrics.sampling_method: Pure reducer: top-1 retrieval hits divided by vector retrieval probe count.
metrics.description: Deterministic health metric for vector retrieval hit rate.

metrics.sampling_method: Pure reducer: count failed or forbidden vector writes observed in the local vector-store health window.
metrics.description: Guardrail metric for vector-store write failures and forbidden external writes.

metrics.sampling_method: Registered setpoint used by the component-health pure reducer for consecutive-failure escalation.
metrics.description: Setpoint for consecutive-failure escalation; changes require slow-loop evidence.

metrics.sampling_method: Count failed items from npm run precheck.
metrics.description: Local health metric for contract, smoke, bridge, and current-line checks.
